neighbors.name: Joni E. McLin
neighbors.claims: Joni E. McLin is listed as the owner of a parcel in Cochise County (PIN 106-47-148) [Cochise County Treasurer](https://parcelinquirytreasurer.cochise.az.gov). Public records identify her as a real estate professional associated with West USA Realty in the Phoenix/Gilbert area [Redfin](https://www.redfin.com/AZ/Phoenix/3017-E-Cochise-Rd-85028/home/28121976) [Zillow](https://www.zillow.com/homedetails/3114-S-Cottonwood-Dr-Gilbert-AZ-85295/52433901_zpid/). No references to her involvement in local Cochise County government, public meetings, or development issues were found, consistent with her primary professional presence in Maricopa County [Cochise County Board of Supervisors](https://cochise.az.gov/AgendaCenter).
neighbors.influence_justification: Real estate professional; primary presence outside county

approach_recommendations.engage: As a real estate professional, McLin may prioritize property value. Approach with a professional, data-driven presentation focusing on how the project preserves land value and integrates with the landscape.

neighbors.name: Grant D. Miles
neighbors.claims: Grant D. Miles is a landowner, approximately 75 years old, who resides at 3079 N Golden Rule Rd in the Cochise, AZ area [Public Records](https://www.simplecontacts.com/profile/Trevor-Teague-12f49419). He has no recorded public statements or involvement in local development disputes or energy projects in the county’s available records [Cochise County Board of Supervisors](https://cochise.az.gov/AgendaCenter).

approach_recommendations.engage: Given his long-term residency, use a peer-to-peer approach. A respected local community member should introduce the project, focusing on land stewardship and minimal agricultural impact to build trust.

citations.claim: Grant D. Miles is a landowner, approximately 75 years old, who resides at 3079 N Golden Rule Rd in the Cochise, AZ area

citations.claim: He has no recorded public statements or involvement in local development disputes

neighbors.name: Rebekah & Ronald L. Mourfield
neighbors.claims: Rebekah and Ronald L. Mourfield jointly own property in Cochise County, specifically identified as a residential property at 103 E Pinal St in Huachuca City [Homes.com](https://www.homes.com/property/103-e-pinal-st-huachuca-city-az/4f1bmchj6l5yc/). There is no indication in public sources that either Rebekah or Ronald Mourfield has taken any public position regarding development or energy projects [Cochise County Planning & Zoning](https://cochise.az.gov/AgendaCenter).
neighbors.influence_justification: Residential owners; no known civic involvement

approach_recommendations.engage: Initial engagement should be neutral and informative. Invite them to a community open house or site tour to answer questions casually, reassuring them that quality of life and property value will be respected.

neighbors.name: Qwest Corporation
neighbors.claims: Qwest Corporation is a major telecommunications utility providing services across Arizona [Arizona Corporation Commission](https://edocket.azcc.gov/Rss). The company is consistently listed as one of the top property taxpayers in Cochise County [Cochise County CAFR](https://www.azauditor.gov/sites/default/files/2023-11/Cochise_CCCD_06_30_10_CAFR.pdf). This entity holds ownership of parcel PIN 106-48-152, likely for infrastructure purposes, and does not participate in community matters as an individual neighbor would.
neighbors.influence_justification: Major utility and top county taxpayer

approach_recommendations.engage: Coordinate through formal channels with Qwest’s regional right-of-way department. Ensure project plans account for existing telecom infrastructure and address technical requirements rather than community persuasion.

citations.claim: Qwest Corporation is a major telecommunications utility providing services across Arizona
citations.title: Arizona Corporation Commission Docket

citations.claim: The company is consistently listed as one of the top property taxpayers in Cochise County
citations.title: Cochise County Community College District CAFR
